_doc: Per-row schema written to the Google Sheet by google_apps_script.gs.

columns.name: ts_iso
columns.doc: Server-side timestamp of the submission, ISO-8601.

columns.name: pid
columns.doc: Prolific participant ID (or other recruitment identifier).

columns.name: study_id
columns.doc: STUDY_ID constant from study.js. Useful when running multiple waves.

columns.name: study_ver
columns.doc: STUDY_VER constant from study.js. Bumped per prototype change.

columns.name: last_phase
columns.doc: Last phase the participant reached. 'debrief' = full completion.

columns.name: completion_code
columns.doc: Code shown to the participant on debrief; pasted into the platform.

columns.name: attention_pass
columns.doc: Result of the embedded attention check.

columns.name: apps_assigned
columns.doc: Comma-separated list of app IDs the participant saw, in order.

columns.name: per_app_json
columns.doc: JSON object keyed by app_id with mcq, L3_2, L3_3, L3_4, T3_5, condition, idx.

columns.name: posttask_json
columns.doc: JSON object with Q5_1, L5_2, T5_3, Q6_1, T6_2, age, gender, edu, it_bg.

columns.name: pretask_json
columns.doc: JSON object with q21, q22, q23.

columns.name: events_json
columns.doc: JSON array of interaction events (view_app, ble_toggle_open/close, etc.) with timestamps.
